{{Quote|I've never actually successfully collected a bounty before. The other bounty hunters tease me quite a bit. Sometimes I cry.|Melvin Fett|<ref name="MF" />}}
'''Melvin Fett''' was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who operated during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He was the [[Clan Fett|cousin]] of the renowned hunter [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], making his repeated failures at apprehending [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] even more comical to his peers. At some point before [[6 BBY/Legends|6 BBY]], Fett accepted a bounty for the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in the hopes of redeeming himself in the [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] of his colleagues. Tracking Binks to the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] world [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], Fett was caught unprepared by the planet's harsh climate, which put him at a tactical disadvantage. Such was his confusion that he mistook a [[Senator Jar Jar Binks commemorative drinking cup]] for the Senator himself. Although he apprehended the cup, Fett failed yet again to retrieve his bounty.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I thought Tatooine was supposed to be a dessert planet!?|Melvin Fett|<ref name="MF" />}}
[[File:Melvincapturesbinks.jpg|thumb|left|185px|A proud moment for Fett]]
Melvin Fett, a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] cousin of the more well-known [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] into [[Clan Fett]]. As he grew up, Fett chose to pursue a career as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]. He attempted to collect at least a few [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] but was unable to do so at each opportunity, which caused his fellow bounty hunters to tease him.<ref name="MF" /> At some point during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]],<ref>This article assumes that the events of the story take place during the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], due to the fact that the story also takes place during [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]]' tenure as [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].</ref> Fett, who hoped to prove himself to his colleagues, accepted a bounty for the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] Imperial [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]], who was a representative for his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. The intelligence that he gathered on the Gungan led Fett to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], which he mistakenly identified as a "dessert" planet instead of a "[[Desert/Legends|desert]]" planet. In the hopes of an easy and glorious catch on a world of [[Cupcake/Legends|cupcakes]] and [[Ice cream/Legends|ice cream]], Fett journeyed to the [[Star/Legends|sunny]] [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]].<ref name="MF" />

Upon arrival in the deserts of Tatooine, Fett was surprised to learn that while the planet's environment offered little in the way of confectionery, it did have massive amounts of sand and [[Binary star/Legends|two scorching suns]]. Fett had brought his heavy [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|Mandalorian armor]], which only made matters worse—he started sweating heavily in the warm climate and experienced optical pains that obstructed his [[Eye/Legends|eyesight]]. Disoriented, yet still motivated, Fett eventually made his way to an area close to a cold-drinks outlet.<ref name="MF" />

Before long, Fett happened upon a local [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] drinking [[Soda/Legends|soda]] from a [[Senator Jar Jar Binks commemorative drinking cup]]. The drinking receptacle's top resembled the Senator himself, and was equipped with "talking action"; the trinket played loud audio clips of Binks. Fett immediately recognized the voice of his quarry, but, due to his impaired vision, he mistook the Gungan-shaped cup for the Senator. He pulled his [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] to apprehend the Gungan but tripped over a small, [[Color/Legends|black]] desert rock, causing him to fall to the ground and hurl the [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] at the unsuspecting Jawa. The weapon hit and rendered the native unconscious, the novelty cup flying from his [[Limb/Legends|hands]] to Fett. Happy to have collected what he thought was his first successful bounty, Fett looked forward to telling the other bounty hunters of his deed.<ref name="MF" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|I'm afraid this might put me at a tactical disadvantage on my mission… to capture Jar Jar Binks! Dead, or alive! Or both! Or neither! Well… hopefully not neither.|Melvin Fett|<ref name="MF" />}}
[[File:Melvintrips.jpg|thumb|right|185px|Fett displays an act of clumsiness.]]
Melvin Fett's ineptitude at his profession was a constant point of disappointment for him, and a trait that earned him the ridicule of his fellow bounty hunters. The constant mocking and lack of respect from his peers caused Fett to shed tears on more than one occasion. Regardless of their scorn, Fett yearned for the acceptance of his detractors. He was quite clumsy and easily fooled, and even believed that Tatooine was a dessert planet. Despite his lack of professional success, Fett maintained a positive outlook on life. When he successfully apprehended what he thought to be Senator Jar Jar Binks, he was ecstatic, looking forward to being recognized as an equal by the bounty hunters with whom he socialized. Fett often talked to himself, spewing forth lengthy monologues on the details of his mission and revealing his deepest feelings.<ref name="MF" />

==Equipment==
Melvin Fett wore a suit of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]] consisting of a green [[Jumpsuit/Legends|jumpsuit]] that even covered his [[Boot/Legends|boots]], and was adorned with protective padding on his elbows and knees. His stomach and chest were covered by a thick armored carapace. The padding was secured by brown straps, the likes of which also supported his blaster pistol's [[Holster/Legends|holster]]. Fett's head sported a Mandalorian helmet, painted green and red, which was complemented by a [[Broadband antenna/Legends|broadband antenna]]. He wore light green protective [[Glove/Legends|gloves]], and his neck was defended by a thin, dark green [[Scarf/Legends|scarf]]. All the heavy equipment he carried had its drawbacks during his [[Time/Legends|time]] on Tatooine, causing him to sweat heavily and muddling his eyesight.<ref name="MF" />

==Behind the scenes==
Melvin Fett's first and only appearance was in the short [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] "[[Melvin Fett (comic story)|Melvin Fett]]," which was collected in [[Star Wars Tales 20|''Star Wars Tales'' 20]]. His story was created, written, and drawn by [[James Kochalka]].<ref name="MF" /> Fett's existence in ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] has not been officially verified in any other source.
